set.body: Seen in R-CMD-check runs 28588796204/28590187400 (Windows + Linux logs), inside the dispatch sweep output during tests: [ERROR] det[dense/cpu]: expected=no error actual=no applicable method for 'determinant' applied to adgeMatrix. Does not currently fail the check (sweep records it as an incident) but det() on adgeMatrix silently depends on Matrix being attached. Same family as the earlier getDLLRegisteredRoutines/Matrix-generic issues: a Matrix generic amatrix relies on without importing/re-exporting a method. Fix direction: define/export a determinant method (or setMethod importFrom Matrix determinant) so det works with only library(amatrix). Add a regression test in the matrix-generic-exports subprocess suite.
set.title: determinant() has no method for adgeMatrix when Matrix is not attached
